layout.name: warpID
layout.title: Warp ID
layout.tooltip: If set to a valid Warp ID, the player will spawn at that warp's exit location rather than on the checkpoint location.

layout.name: sound
layout.title: Sound
layout.tooltip: The ID of or path to the sound effect to play.

layout.name: powerup
layout.title: Powerup
layout.tooltip: Which powerup to grant upon collecting this checkpoint.

layout.name: ignoreTierCheck
layout.title: Can power down
layout.tooltip: If set to true, the checkpoint can force a big player down to small state. Otherwise, powering down to small or big is not possible.
